---
title: "11. 自然与朴素"
subtitle: "Naturalness, Simplicity, and the Uncarved Block"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 11
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 15, 19, 27, 28, 32, 37, 44, 57, 67, 68, 80, and 81 map naturalness and the uncarved block onto minimal constraint structure and Zeckendorf sparsity."
---

**Chapters:** 15, 19, 27, 28, 32, 37, 44, 57, 67, 68, 80, 81  
**Omega Directions:** `golden-mean shift`, `Zeckendorf representation`

{{< include articles/category_11_naturalness_simplicity.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)

## Video & Media

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_naturalness_simplicity_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_naturalness_simplicity_slides.pdf)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_naturalness_simplicity_video.mp4)
- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_11_naturalness_simplicity_infographic.png)
